backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management, YouTube OAuth integration, user profiles, admin controls, clip similarity scoring, trending analytics, and AI-generated clip suggestions with access control and HTTP outcalls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: resolving the Google Client ID configuration error and verifying the end-to-end OAuth connection flow for YouTube account integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including React components, hooks, routing, styling, and functionality for video clipping, OAuth integration, admin features, and AI clip suggestions.
frontend/.env.example: Environment variable template with detailed step-by-step instructions for obtaining and configuring Google OAuth Client ID, including troubleshooting guidance for common OAuth errors.
frontend/.gitignore: Git ignore configuration excluding node_modules, build artifacts, editor files, logs, and environment variable files (.env, .env.local, .env.production).
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with 'Beast Clipping' title and root div mounting the React application via main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with TanStack Router setup, authentication flow, profile setup, video URL management, OAuth callback routing, and integrated components for video clipping, AI suggestions, and channel connection.
Displays detailed authentication debug information for admins, including principal IDs, admin status, hash map size, and character-by-character string comparison utilities. Provides refresh functionality and handles loading/error states with detailed diagnostics.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors in the admin panel with detailed error messages, stack traces, and component stacks. Provides retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Displays a list of current admin users with their principal IDs and generated short user IDs. Shows loading skeletons and error alerts, with empty state handling.
Form component for adding new admins by entering their full Principal ID, with validation, success/error messaging, and integration with AdminList component. Includes helpful text distinguishing Principal IDs from short User IDs.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard displaying statistics (total clips, trending analytics), collapsible debug panel, admin management section, and data tables. Handles loading states, errors, and query invalidation.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Manages YouTube channel connection via Google OAuth, displaying connected channel info with avatar or prompting connection. Handles connect/disconnect actions with loading states and configuration checks.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single video clip card with thumbnail, title, viral score, duration, and action buttons for deleting, posting to YouTube, and downloading. Includes YouTube channel connection status checks and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading states and empty state messaging. Handles clip selection and deletion.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores and timestamps. Allows users to select suggestions to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Provides a form for creating video clips with start/end timestamp inputs and title field. Handles validation, clip creation, and updates from selected clips or suggestions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation, authentication controls, and conditional admin button display. Manages Internet Identity login/logout and includes debug logging for admin access.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form component that collects user name and email on first login. Validates input and saves profile data before allowing access to the main application.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the user's short ID and full principal ID with copy-to-clipboard functionality for both values. Shows two side-by-side cards with copy buttons that provide visual feedback when clicked.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation and an AI clip generation button. Validates URLs, extracts video IDs, and triggers auto-generation of clip suggestions.
Badge component that displays a viral potential score (0-100) with color-coded styling and icons based on score thresholds. Supports three sizes and optional label display.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Embeds a YouTube video player using an iframe with the provided video ID. Renders in a responsive 16:9 aspect ratio container.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with optional Internet Identity authentication. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Mutation hook for adding a new admin user by user ID, invalidating admin-related queries on success. Currently expects full principal text rather than short user IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Query hook that fetches admin debug information including current principal, admin status, and admin list. Returns placeholder data until backend method is fully implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend. Requires an authenticated actor and admin permissions.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Query hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics. Combines two separate queries with error handling and retry logic.
Mutation hook for AI-powered clip generation that currently uses mock data with realistic suggestions. Falls back to mock generation if backend returns empty results.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Mutation hook for creating clips with automatic viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics. Invalidates clip queries on successful creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: React hook that fetches all video clips using React Query and provides a mutation to delete clips with loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: State management hook for clip start/end timestamps with validation, formatting, and conversion between minutes/seconds and total seconds. Provides helpers for setting timestamps from seconds and checking validity.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: React hook that provides a mutation to download video clips by generating a download URL from the backend and triggering a browser download with a sanitized filename.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React hook that queries the backend to check if the current user is an admin/owner, with extensive debug logging and state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: React hook that provides a mutation to post video clips to YouTube as Shorts, validating OAuth connection and 60-second duration limit before posting.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profile management, Google OAuth status checking, and storing OAuth credentials with query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: React hook managing YouTube channel connection via Google OAuth, including initiating OAuth flow, checking connection status, and disconnecting accounts.
React hook providing utility functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: React component that handles OAuth callback from Google, validates state parameter, stores authorization code via backend mutation, and redirects user with success/error feedback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and parameter cleanup capabilities.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Generates deterministic 8-character user IDs from principal strings using a simple hash function converted to base36.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for tracking YouTube OAuth flow with structured logging, response validation, and common error pattern detection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking known issues with Google posting feature and existing features related to Google OAuth Client ID configuration and connection flow verification.
